steps.name: mobile-taxonomy-and-candidate-contract
steps.summary: Defined mobile-specific UI taxonomy, candidate batches, acceptance rules, search fixture additions, and phone-frame visual direction in docs/ui-vocabulary/mobile-expansion.md. Added horizon plan in docs/plans/2026-06-26-ui-vocabulary-mobile-expansion.md.

steps.name: mobile-app-shell-and-navigation
steps.summary: Added seven mobile app-shell/navigation terms: safe-area, mobile-status-bar, mobile-app-bar, large-title-header, bottom-app-bar, mobile-search-header, and mobile-segmented-tabs. Added shared PhoneFrame visual wrapper and matching variants, updated group filters, regenerated 264-term dataset, and verified build/lint plus 390px Chrome smoke for representative mobile queries without horizontal overflow.

steps.name: mobile-overlays-and-system-feedback
steps.summary: Added twelve mobile overlay/system feedback terms: standard-bottom-sheet, modal-bottom-sheet, action-sheet, share-sheet, full-screen-dialog, permission-prompt, permission-education-screen, mobile-snackbar, mobile-toast, mobile-alert-dialog, mobile-popover-menu, and sheet-drag-handle. Added phone-frame mini visuals, updated group filters, regenerated 276-term dataset, and verified build/lint plus 390px Chrome smoke for representative overlay queries without horizontal overflow.

steps.name: mobile-gestures-and-touch-affordances
steps.summary: Added twelve mobile gesture/touch affordance terms: pull-to-refresh-indicator, swipe-to-delete, swipe-action-row, long-press-menu, drag-to-reorder-list, grab-handle, page-control, carousel-peek, edge-swipe-back, pinch-zoom-viewer, scrim, and touch-ripple. Added matching phone-frame visuals, updated group filters, regenerated 288-term dataset, and verified build/lint plus 390px Chrome smoke for representative gesture queries without horizontal overflow.

steps.name: mobile-inputs-pickers-and-auth
steps.summary: Added twelve mobile input/picker/auth terms: otp-code-input, passcode-keypad, biometric-prompt, mobile-date-picker, wheel-picker, time-wheel-picker, mobile-search-sheet, chip-input-mobile, contact-picker, address-autocomplete, voice-input-button, and clear-text-button. Added matching phone-frame visuals, updated group filters, regenerated 300-term dataset, and verified build/lint plus 390px Chrome smoke for representative mobile input queries without horizontal overflow.

steps.name: mobile-content-commerce-and-audit
steps.summary: Added fifteen mobile content/commerce/map/onboarding terms: feed-card-mobile, story-rail, story-viewer, media-lightbox-mobile, comment-composer, bottom-cta-bar, product-option-sheet, cart-summary-bar, checkout-progress-header, delivery-tracker, map-bottom-panel, location-permission-empty, onboarding-pager, coach-mark, and mobile-empty-feed. Updated mobile query boosts, regenerated 315-term dataset, verified build/lint and 390px Chrome smoke, and documented duplicate/category audit in docs/ui-vocabulary/mobile-audit-2026-06-26.md.
